chunks.title: The Parable of the Rich and Poor Man
chunks.reason: Nathan tells a complete story to confront David.

chunks.title: David's Judgment on the Parable
chunks.reason: David reacts to the parable and pronounces judgment.

chunks.title: Nathan's Oracle Against David
chunks.reason: Nathan delivers God's specific judgment and prophecy against David.

chunks.title: David's Confession and Consequence
chunks.reason: Dialogue between David and Nathan regarding sin and the child's fate.

chunks.title: The Death of the Child
chunks.reason: Narrative of the child's illness, David's fasting, and his acceptance of death.

chunks.title: Birth of Solomon
chunks.reason: David comforts Bathsheba and the birth of their next son.

chunks.title: Conquest of Rabbah
chunks.reason: Narrative of Joab's siege and David's final victory over the Ammonites.
